history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front (north) is lava, so moving forward is fatal. The only safe adjacent cell is to my right (east), which is floor. I need to turn right to face east before moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north at (7,D). The cell directly ahead is (6,D) which is floor. The cells to my left and right are lava and wall respectively. I cannot see the goal yet, but moving forward along the clear corridor of column D seems safe and will reveal more of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row07 column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row06 column D) is floor, while the right is wall and left is lava. Moving forward is safe and will allow further exploration.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7, D) facing up. The cell directly ahead (6, D) is a floor tile. There is no goal visible in the current view. Moving forward will allow further exploration of the corridor. Other directions are blocked by lava or walls.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6, D) is floor, safe to move. Turning left or right leads to lava or wall. Goal is not visible, so we should explore forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row07 colD facing north. The cell directly ahead (row06 colD) is a floor cell, so it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will lead me to new area, which may help me find the goal. There are no immediate obstacles in this direction.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is a floor tile (`.`), which is safe to move into. There are lava cells to the left and a wall to the right, so moving forward is the best immediate action. From the new position, we can explore further west where there are more floor tiles.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) is a wall (#). The cell to my left (west) is empty floor (.). Turning left will allow me to move into unexplored territory in search of the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column D, facing north (indicated by the '^' symbol). The goal is at row 1, column D, directly ahead. The cell directly in front (row 6, column D) is floor (.), so it is safe to move forward. There are no obstacles in the immediate path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly north at row02, column D. The cells directly ahead (north) are all floor cells (rows 06, 05, 04, 03) leading to the goal. There are no obstacles in the immediate path. I will move forward to make progress towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly north at row03 column D. The cells directly ahead (row06 D, row05 D, row04 D) are all floor, so the path is clear. I will move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (row7, colD) facing north. The goal 'G' is directly north at (row4, colD), three cells away. The cell directly ahead (row6, colD) is a floor '.' and safe. There are no obstacles in that direction. I will move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07 column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 06 column D) is a floor cell (.), and beyond that is the goal at row 05 column D. There are no obstacles in the path. Therefore, moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 06 column D. I can safely move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
